reviewed_head.subject: Implement the read-only local prompt-registry overlay pipeline: loader, resolver, assembler, and authority verifier for the approved in-scope workflows and profiles

review_scope.basis: bounded batch execution under merged contract layer
review_scope.limitation: implement packet is opened from an approved plan, but runtime execution evidence for D1-D4 is still pending

verdict.summary: Implement-open review accepted the packet structure, but runtime artifacts and evidence for D1-D4 are not emitted yet.
